'''pathuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabosu|kabosu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-th-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabosu|kabosu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pathuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæthihith|pæthihith]] || [[word:pæthihij|pæthihij]] || [[word:pæthihish|pæthihish]] || [[word:pæthihi|pæthihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathuthuhuth|pathuthuhuth]] || [[word:pathuthuhuj|pathuthuhuj]] || [[word:pathuthuhush|pathuthuhush]] || [[word:pathuthuhu|pathuthuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathuhuth|pathuhuth]] || [[word:pathuhuj|pathuhuj]] || [[word:pathuhush|pathuhush]] || [[word:pathuhu|pathuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathufhuth|pathufhuth]] || [[word:pathufhuj|pathufhuj]] || [[word:pathufhush|pathufhush]] || [[word:pathufhuf|pathufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pathuhuthu|pathuhuthu]] || [[word:pathuhuju|pathuhuju]] || [[word:pathuhushu|pathuhushu]] || [[word:pathuhuku|pathuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pathuhuth|pathuhuth]] || [[word:pathuhuj|pathuhuj]] || [[word:pathuhush|pathuhush]] || [[word:pathuhu|pathuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pathuhuthul|pathuhuthul]] || [[word:pathuhujul|pathuhujul]] || [[word:pathuhushul|pathuhushul]] || [[word:pathuhukul|pathuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pathuhuthuthu|pathuhuthuthu]] || [[word:pathuhujuju|pathuhujuju]] || [[word:pathuhushushu|pathuhushushu]] || [[word:pathuhuku|pathuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pathuhuthun|pathuhuthun]] || [[word:pathuhujun|pathuhujun]] || [[word:pathuhushun|pathuhushun]] || [[word:pathuhukun|pathuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pathuhuthuoro|pathuhuthuoro]] || [[word:pathuhujuoro|pathuhujuoro]] || [[word:pathuhushuoro|pathuhushuoro]] || [[word:pathuhukuoro|pathuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
